notice: Every person, employer, role, metric, and outcome in this demo is fictional.

candidate.headline: Architecture and integration leader
candidate.summary: Sascha is a fictional, gender-neutral European technology leader used only to demonstrate a reviewable application-planning workflow.

vacancies.title: Platform Architecture Lead

vacancies.gap: Cloud operations depth is useful but not required.

vacancies.title: Technical Product Architect
vacancies.summary: Shape product architecture for workflow automation used by enterprise teams.
vacancies.gap: Commercial discovery experience should be explored in interview.

vacancies.title: Engineering Delivery Manager
vacancies.summary: Guide cross-functional delivery for a data-rich logistics platform.
vacancies.gap: The role asks for direct people-management evidence.
